COMMON.NAME: Name
COMMON.NO_ENVIRONMENTS_DESC: To see environment-specific feature states and configurations, you need to create at least one environment.

FEATURES.TITLE: Features
FEATURES.NO_NOTES: No notes yet. Be the first to add one!
FEATURES.COPY_ENV_TOOLTIP: Select environment to copy overrides from:

STRATEGY.EXTEND_TOOLTIP: Extend the default configuration with environment specific settings
STRATEGY.OVERRIDE_TOOLTIP: Replace the default configuration with environment specific settings

ENVIRONMENTS.TITLE: Environments
ENVIRONMENTS.CONFIRM_DELETE: Are you sure you want to delete this environment?
ENVIRONMENTS.NO_RULES: No rules configured for this environment.

CLIENTS.TITLE: Clients Registry
CLIENTS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete the client "{{name}}"? This will also remove all its presences.
CLIENTS.UPDATE_CONFIRM_PROMPT: Changing the name or token will break existing SDK integrations. Please type the application name "{{name}}" to confirm:
CLIENTS.CREATE_PROMPT: Enter the name of the new client:
CLIENTS.DANGER_ZONE_WARNING: Warning: Changing these values will break any existing SDK integrations using the old values.
CLIENTS.NO_USAGE_RECORDED: No feature usage recorded yet for this application.
CLIENTS.DANGER_ZONE_DESC: You can delete this client all associated data, including its presence in environments and feature usage records. This action cannot be undone.

SETTINGS.TITLE: System Settings
SETTINGS.REQUIRE_CLIENT_TOKEN_TOOLTIP: Enabling this option requires clients to authenticate with a token when connecting to the server. All applications need to then use a generated client token or would not be able to access Vivid.
SETTINGS.ALLOW_DYNAMIC_REGISTRATION_TOOLTIP: Disabling this option prevents clients from registering themselves dynamically. If disabled, you need to register clients before they can interact with vivid.
SETTINGS.ONLINE_THRESHOLD_TOOLTIP: How long a client is considered online before it is considered offline.

DISTRIBUTION.TITLE: Distribution Providers
DISTRIBUTION.SUBTITLE: These providers are responsible for pushing feature flag updates to connected clients.

LOGIN.NO_AUTH_PROVIDER: No external authentication provider is configured.
LOGIN.TITLE: Login
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Welcome to Vivid. Please sign in to manage your feature flags.
